Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: An individual vote cast by a user.

value.description: The numeric value of the vote.

userId.description: The UID of the user who cast the vote.

Stats.title: Stats
Stats.description: Aggregated statistics for the voting system.

totalScore.description: The sum of all vote values.

voteCount.description: The total number of votes cast.

/votes/{sessionUserId}.description: Vote document keyed by {sessionId}_{userId} to allow repeated voting in different sessions.

/stats/global.description: Global statistics including targetAudience and sessionId.
